title: Verify and update PRD gap status — test suites, README, scan streaming
description: Re-evaluate prd.json gaps against current state: (1) PRD §4 'Complete per-backend test suites' — 53 test files exist in test/, verify this is now implemented; (2) PRD §5 'README with usage examples' — README.md exists, verify it covers all backends; (3) PRD §1 scan() streaming — check if AgenticStoreBackend now streams properly; (4) Update prd.json to reflect actual status of each gap. Goal: bring PRD match from 72% closer to 90%.
